features: LONG-LASTING FRAGRANCE: Premium lavender scent air freshener spray that provides extended freshness throughout your living spaces
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for multiple environments including homes, offices, bathrooms, and living rooms to maintain a pleasant atmosphere
GENEROUS QUANTITY: Comes in a value pack of 6 bottles, with each bottle containing 240ml of refreshing lavender spray
ODOUR ELIMINATION: Effectively neutralises unwanted odours whilst leaving behind a soothing lavender fragrance
EASY APPLICATION: Convenient spray bottle design allows for quick and simple room freshening whenever needed
description: Transform your living spaces with Charm Air Freshener Spray in a delightful lavender scent. This convenient pack of six 240ml bottles ensures you always have fresh-smelling rooms throughout your home or office. The long-lasting formula helps eliminate unwanted odours whilst filling the air with the soothing, classic aroma of lavender. Perfect for bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, and workspaces, this room spray offers versatile freshening power. Each spray delivers consistent fragrance that helps create an inviting atmosphere for family and guests. The generous 240ml size provides extended use, whilst the multi-pack format offers excellent value and ensures you're never without a replacement. Keep your spaces smelling clean and fresh with this practical air freshening solution from Charm.
